creator: jsmith@resonatingmedia.com
text:
Created attachment 182183
Initial port of SeqBox archiver

Please find attached my port of the SeqBox archiving software. This collection of Python 3 scripts creates, scans and unpacks archives which are designed to survive most forms of file system destruction.

The SeqBox GitHub page and README can be found here: https://github.com/MarcoPon/SeqBox
